description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that triggers on push to src/* paths. The workflow should have two jobs: build_linux on ubuntu-16.04 and build_windows on windows-latest. The build_linux job should check out code, generate versions, configure CMake, build, test, and upload a Linux library artifact. The build_windows job depends on build_linux, prepares the environment, generates versions, tests, downloads the Linux library, builds, and releases a package.
